channel.title: Publix & Kroger Weekly Deals Digest
channel.description: Weekly grocery deals: watched items, new BOGOs, and recipe ideas.

item.title: Grocery deals — week of 7/15 – 7/21
item.description:
167 Publix BOGOs · 50 Kroger deals

New at Publix this week

  • Post Fruity Pebbles Cereal
  • Thomas' English Muffins
  • Catalina Crunch Cereal
  • Old El Paso Taco Dinner Kit
  • Maxwell House Ground Coffee
  • Botticelli Premium Pasta Sauce
  • Duke's Mayonnaise
  • Arnold or Brownberry Bread
  • Lay's Potato Chips
  • Nabisco Oreo Cookies
  • Orville Redenbacher's Gourmet Popping Corn
  • Wonder Bread
  • Unreal Chocolate
  • Mayfield Creamery Ice Cream
  • Président Whipped Crème
  • The Greek Gods Greek Yogurt Style
  • Digiorno Stuffed Crust Pizza
  • Nestlé Drumstick Sundae Cones
  • Celentano Pasta
  • Arm & Hammer Laundry Detergent
  • …and 20 more

New at Kroger this week

  • Fresh Springer Mountain Farms Boneless Chicken Breasts or Tenderloins
  • Whole Boneless Beef Brisket
  • Pork Boston Butt
  • Red, Green or Black Seedless Grapes
  • Tillamook Cheese
  • Kroger Tri-Color Bell Peppers
  • Kellogg's Giant Size Cereal
  • Private Selection Ice Cream
  • Smartway Sugar
  • Kroger Soft & Strong Bath Tissue
  • Thomas' English Muffins
  • 2 lb Strawberries
  • Freschetta Pizza
  • Kroger Purified Water
  • Kroger or Private Selection Bacon
  • Barilla Pasta
  • Birds Eye Family Size Voilà Entrée
  • Hormel Pepperoni
  • Bounty Paper Towels
  • Stok Cold Brew Coffee
  • …and 10 more

This week's recipes

  • Sheet-Pan Italian Sausage, Peppers & Potatoes
  • Garlic-Lime Shrimp & Yellow Rice Bowls
  • Chicken & Broccoli Stir-Fry over Jasmine Rice
  • Ground Beef & Mushroom Bolognese
  • Salsa-Simmered Pork Tacos with Avocado

item.title: Grocery deals — week of 7/8 – 7/14
item.description:
158 Publix BOGOs · 55 Kroger deals

New at Publix this week

  • McCormick Grill Mates Seasonings
  • Thomas' Products
  • Idahoan Mashed Potatoes
  • Purely Elizabeth. Granola
  • New England Coffee Ground Coffee
  • Swanson Broth
  • Gia Russa Select Pasta Sauce
  • Bertolli Olive Oil
  • Kraft Mayonnaise
  • Justin's Organic Peanut Butter Cups
  • Sparkling Ice Flavored Water
  • Nabisco Nilla Wafers
  • Nature's Own Perfectly Crafted Bread
  • Pop-Secret Premium Popcorn
  • Halo Top Ice Cream
  • Califia Farms Cold Brew Coffee
  • Screamin' Sicilian Pizza Co. Pizza
  • Bagel Bites Pizza Snacks
  • Häagen-Dazs Ice Cream
  • Oatly! Oatmilk
  • …and 20 more

New at Kroger this week

  • Boneless Chuck Roast
  • Private Selection Angus 90% Lean Ground Sirloin
  • Fresh Perdue Chicken Drumsticks, Thighs or Wings
  • Oscar Mayer Bacon
  • California Red, Green or Black Seedless Grapes
  • Blueberries
  • Taylor Farms Salad Kit
  • Private Selection Stone Fired Pizza
  • Private Selection Frozen Entrée
  • Kroger Butter
  • Thomas English Muffins
  • Bibigo or Pagoda Entrée
  • Green Mountain or McCafé K-Cups
  • Pepsi
  • Coca-Cola
  • Starbucks Frappuccino
  • Polar Seltzer Water
  • Body Armor
  • Canada Dry
  • Lipton Tea
  • …and 20 more

This week's recipes

  • Chimichurri Chicken Thighs with Jasmine Rice & Blistered Mushrooms
  • Sheet-Pan Salmon with Crispy Smashed Potatoes
  • Salsa-Smothered Pork Chops with Rice & Avocado
  • Ground Chicken Tacos with Avocado & Salsa
  • Garlic Shrimp & Mushroom Spaghetti

item.title: Grocery deals — week of 7/1 – 7/7
item.description:
204 Publix BOGOs · 46 Kroger deals

This week's recipes

  • BBQ Chicken with Charred Corn & Crispy Potatoes
  • Shrimp Tacos with Avocado-Lime Crema
  • Smoky Kielbasa & Tomato Rice Skillet
  • Backyard Burger Night
  • Sticky BBQ Ribs with Corn & Watermelon
